SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OF DEFENDANT'S CLAIM TO JUN-14-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT AMPARO HERNDON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANT IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY KEN NEU, ADMINISTRATIVE ANALYST AND ELIZABETH J. MILLER, CLAIM ADMINISTRATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 4/18/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED-RETURN TO SENDER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SAN FRANCISCO SCHOOL SYSTEM - SFUSD RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT HERNDON, AMPARO $366.89 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $366.89, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS THE PREREQUISITE CLAIM PURSUANT TO SFSD SCHOOL BOARD POLICY AND THE GOVERNMENT CLAIMS ACT HAS NOT BEEN FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
